cardio.title: Cardio Assessment
cardio.subtitle: Pick a test mode. Save to stint axis.
cardio.cooperHint: Track or GPS. Model ceiling: {{maleCap}} m (male), {{femaleCap}} m (female); scores cap above.
cardio.cooperWorldRecordCapHint: Distance exceeds model ceiling ({{capMeters}} m for your profile). Scoring uses capped distance.

cooperInfo.title: Cooper 12-Minute Run Test
cooperInfo.p1: 12-minute maximal-distance field test (Dr. Kenneth H. Cooper lineage). Estimates cardiorespiratory fitness without lab VO₂ max. Fitness context only — not medical diagnosis.
cooperInfo.p2: Use a track or flat route; count laps or GPS meters. Warm up 10–15 minutes before the test.
cooperInfo.p3: Score maps sex and age to norm distance tables: 60- and 100-point anchors differ by band. Linear interpolation between anchors; scores can exceed 100 beyond top anchor. Cooper band from age 13+.
cooperInfo.p4: Norm distances follow published Cooper chart lineage (including Swahn-associated compendia). Institutions may differ slightly; this app uses the reference anchor table.
cooperInfo.p5: Prefer track or GPS routes. Model ceilings: 4900 m (male), 4400 m (female); scores cap above.

cardio.run5kmHint: Sex-specific anchors from Home: male 20:00 = 100, 45:00 = 0; female 22:30 = 100, 50:00 = 0. Faster than 100-pt anchor uses nonlinear overflow (scores above 100). Missing sex defaults to male norms. Stored on device only.
cardio.nextMilestoneHint: Next Milestone: {{points}} pts until next tier upgrade.
cardio.submitDone: Saved — Home radar and history use this score.
cardio.profileIncompleteHint: Cooper needs age and sex on Home. 5 km tab works with time only.

errors.missing-profile: Complete physical profile on Home to use Cooper.
errors.missing-profile-cooper: Set age and sex on Home before Cooper.
errors.cooper-no-standard: No Cooper table for this age — check profile (13+).
errors.invalid-5km-time: Enter valid 5 km time (minutes and/or seconds).
